pr.title: GatedAttn + ValueResid + XSA6 + HedgeMixer + Legal TTT — val_bpb: 1.08965 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Adds per-head gated attention and per-block value residual scalars atop the HedgeMixer XSA stack while keeping LoRA TTT adaptation for evaluation.
techniques: Head-wise FP32 gate scalars kept out of quantization
Block-wise value residual scalars inject initial embedding into residual stream
LoRA TTT adaptation on validation tokens before scoring
